summary: All 3 revision 14 fixes verified. validate_all PASS (0 errors, 9 pre-existing warnings). All regressions from previous cycles confirmed passing. One informational note raised about parseFloat of CSS unit string in the max-height formula.

fixes.description: Mobile menu max-height improved: JS now computes window.innerHeight - rect.top - 32 (py padding) - logoRowHeight - bottomSpacing (--side-gutter). CSS uses menu-open:max-h-(--menu-max-height).
fixes.evidence: At 375px, scrollY=600, header fixed (position=fixed, top=32): logoRowHeight=26, headerPadding=32, bottomSpacing=1 (see note), computedFormula=809, cssVar=809px, navMaxHeight=809px. navBottom=650, viewportHeight=900, fitsInViewport=true, overflow=-250px. navOverflowY=auto. Formula resolves correctly without circular dependency (no stale state from prior open).
fixes.note: INFORMATIONAL — bottomSpacing parses as 1 instead of 16: getComputedStyle returns '--side-gutter' as '1rem' and parseFloat('1rem') strips the unit, yielding 1 instead of 16. This produces a ~15px smaller bottom gap than intended. Not a blocker — menu still fits viewport comfortably — but worth addressing (e.g. use getPropertyValue on a pixel-resolved custom property, or compute rem manually via parseFloat(getComputedStyle(root).fontSize)).

fixes.description: multiple:false removed from block.json: blocks/Header/block.json and blocks/Header/HeaderMain/block.json no longer have 'multiple': false in their supports.
fixes.evidence: blocks/Header/block.json supports: { html: false, anchor: true, inserter: true } — no 'multiple' key. blocks/Header/HeaderMain/block.json supports: { html: false, anchor: true } — no 'multiple' key. Confirmed by direct file read.

fixes.description: Logo-to-line spacing: menu-open:pt-4 changed to menu-open:pt-8. Space above hr should equal space below hr (~32px each).
fixes.evidence: OPEN state at 375px: navPaddingTop=32px (pt-8=2rem=32px), navPaddingBottom=32px. spaceLogoToHr=32px (logo row bottom 74 to hr top 106). spaceHrToItem=32px (hr bottom 107 to first item top 139). navGap=32px (gap-8). Both spacings are exactly equal at 32px. CLOSED state: navPaddingTop=0px, navPaddingBottom=0px, navMaxHeight=0px — no padding or space when collapsed.

regressions.description: Tab to nav items shows white dotted outline
regressions.evidence: 6 Tab presses to .header-main-item-button: outlineStyle=dotted, outlineColor=rgb(255,255,255), outlineWidth=2px, isNavBtn=true.

regressions.description: ArrowDown opens submenu and focuses first sub-item with correct outline
regressions.evidence: ArrowDown from About button: tag=A, text=Who We Are, outlineStyle=dotted, outlineColor=rgb(255,255,255), submenuOpen=true.

regressions.description: Escape closes submenu and returns focus to parent button
regressions.evidence: Escape from sub-item: focused=BUTTON:About, btnAriaExpanded=false, submenuHidden=true.

regressions.description: Hamburger icon visible as white on dark background at 375px
regressions.evidence: toggleDisplay=block, toggleColor=rgb(255,255,255), spanOpenDisplay=block, spanOpenWidth=28px. Visually confirmed in closed-state screenshot.

regressions.description: body.css *:focus-visible in @layer base allows Tailwind utilities to override (FQA-005)
regressions.evidence: Header nav items show white dotted outline. Global cascade layer ordering confirmed intact.

codeReviewNotes: blocks/Header/block.json: supports has html, anchor, inserter — no multiple key. CONFIRMED.
blocks/Header/HeaderMain/block.json: supports has html, anchor — no multiple key. CONFIRMED.
HeaderMain.php line 142: menu-open:pt-8 menu-open:pb-8 — pt-8 confirmed (was pt-4). CONFIRMED.
HeaderMain.php line 142: max-md:transition-[max-height,opacity,padding] — padding transitions smoothly. CONFIRMED.
HeaderMain.js lines 59-73: updateMenuMaxHeight formula uses rect.top + headerPadding(32) + logoRowHeight + bottomSpacing(--side-gutter). CONFIRMED.
HeaderMain.js line 67: parseFloat(sideGutterRaw) where sideGutterRaw='1rem' yields 1, not 16. Informational note raised — not a blocker.
validate_all: PASS (0 errors, 9 warnings — all pre-existing in other blocks)
